2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX

To The Stewards

1 
 
 
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 
05 – 07 June 2026 
 
  
  
From The FIA Formula 1 Technical Delegate   
  
To The Stewards      Date  05 June 2026 
  
 
 
TECHNICAL DELEGATE’S REPORT 
 
The following drivers will start the sixth  Competition of the 2026 Formula One World 
Championship with a new energy store (ES): 
 
Number Car Driver Previously used ES 
    
14 Aston Martin Aramco Honda Fernando Alonso 2 
 
The energy store unit used by the above driver is one (1) of the three (3) new energy store units 
allowed for the 2026 Championship season and this is in conformity with Article B8.2.2 d) of the 
2026 Formula One Sporting Regulations. 
 
 
The following drivers will start the sixth  Competition of the 2026 Formula One World 
Championship with a new control electronics unit (PU-CE): 
 
Number Car Driver Previously used PU-CE 
    
14 Aston Martin Aramco Honda Fernando Alonso 2
